wordplay_note: A cat among the game-players — predatory and sly
card_description: Nats Katz (meaning "Katz = cat (German)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Game-Players of Titan*. Vugs (Titanian aliens) using the Bindmen game to colonize Earth. Name note: A cat among the game-players — predatory and sly. The alien infiltrator disguised as a player. First appears in *The Game-Players of Titan*.

reference.brief: Vugs (Titanian aliens) using the Bindmen game to colonize Earth
reference.significance: The alien infiltrator disguised as a player
